name: Get Training on the Maropost Commerce Platform
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The following Frequently Asked Questions regarding Maropost Commerce training are outlined within this article:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#1", "children": [{"text": "What training and support options are available to me?"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#2", "children": [{"text": "Can I see within Learn Maropost Commerce the courses my staff have completed?"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#3", "children": [{"text": "I have a new staff member. What are the steps for them to be trained in Maropost Commerce as quickly as possible?"}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h4", "children": [{"text": "What training and support options are available to me?"}], "data-id": "what-training-and-support-options-are-available-to-me"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "There are a number of training and support options available to you:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "If you're after a "}, {"text": "range of support articles", "bold": true}, {"text": " that you can browse / search for specific topics, then the "}, {"text": "Maropost Commerce Support Hub", "bold": true}, {"type": "a", "url": "http://galaxy.maropost.com/home/leaving?allowTrusted=1&target=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.netohq.com%2Fsupport%2Fs%2F", "children": [{"text": "can be found at this link"}]}, {"text": "."}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "	Either click on one of the many links within the site to access a topic, or enter a term into the Search bar."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "If you can't find the support article or topic within Support Hub, check the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "http://galaxy.maropost.com/home/leaving?allowTrusted=1&target=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.netohq.com%2Fsupport%2Fs%2Fcommunity", "children": [{"text": "Maropost Commerce community"}]}, {"text": " for commonly answered questions."}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "	Maropost Commerce partners even have exclusive access to their "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/partner-portal", "children": [{"text": "own community"}]}, {"text": " to discuss news, general discussions and business opportunities."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "If you're after "}, {"text": "training that can be completed in your own time ", "bold": true}, {"text": "at your own pace, we have a range of "}, {"text": "free online training courses ", "bold": true}, {"text": "at Learn Maropost Commerce "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/commerce-articles?categories=Maropost_Galaxy__c%3AOnline_Courses__c", "children": [{"text": "available within the Maropost Commerce Support Hub"}]}, {"text": "."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h4", "children": [{"text": "Can I see within Learn Maropost Commerce the courses my staff have completed?", "bold": true}], "data-id": "can-i-see-within-learn-maropost-commerce-the-courses-my-staff-have-completed"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "All courses in Learn Maropost Commerce are user based and there is currently no way to see within the Partner portal the courses that you staff members have completed."}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "If you need to know the courses your staff have completed, send a request to the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/contactsupport", "children": [{"text": "Maropost Commerce Support team"}]}, {"text": " with a list of the staff members."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Maropost Commerce will only share information about a staff member that works at your company, and not any contractors or customer's user details."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h4", "children": [{"text": "I have a new staff member. What are the steps for them to be trained in Maropost Commerce as quickly as possible?", "bold": true}], "data-id": "i-have-a-new-staff-member-what-are-the-steps-for-them-to-be-trained-in-maropost-commerce-as-quickly-as-possible"}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "First Name"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Last Name"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Job Title"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Email Address"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Telephone Number"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Request Access to your Maropost Commerce Partner portal"}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "	Send an email to the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/contactsupport", "children": [{"text": "Maropost Commerce Support team"}]}, {"text": " requesting access to the additional staff members."}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "	Within the same request, ask for access to your Partner portal account and send the following new staff member details:"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Create a sandbox webstore for self-learning"}, {"text": "
"}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Create-A-Store-On-Behalf-Of-A-Client", "children": [{"text": "Set up a temporary webstore within the Partner portal"}]}, {"text": "."}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "	Within the creation criteria, set the "}, {"text": "Trial type ", "bold": true}, {"text": "dropdown"}, {"text": " ", "bold": true}, {"text": "as 'internal' and "}, {"text": "Described as ", "bold": true}, {"text": "dropdown as"}, {"text": " '", "bold": true}, {"text": "Just Investigating'."}]}]}]}]
